caption: 逾期未收汇查询

fields.caption: 收汇状态(0未收汇1已收汇 2部分收汇3视同收汇)
fields.name: 收汇状态(0未收汇1已收汇 2部分收汇3视同收汇)

view.params:
SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.SID=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算条件")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")

SELECT (cnshengf.zwmc+cnshengf.ywmc) as ywmc1
FROM cnshengf
ORDER BY cnshengf.zwmc ASC

fields.caption: 收汇状态(0未收汇1已收汇 2部分收汇3视同收汇)
fields.name: 收汇状态(0未收汇1已收汇 2部分收汇3视同收汇)

view.params:
SELECT bzhfsh.zhwbzh,bzhfsh.SID
FROM bzhfsh
ORDER BY bzhfsh.SID ASC

name: 逾期未收汇查询
title_field: 逾期未收汇查询.发票号
